message:
fix(security): systemd TOCTOU, unit file parsing, and PID hint timestamps

Three security/reliability fixes:

1. Systemd TOCTOU race (HIGH): Replace unit-file-only check with
   `systemctl --user is-active --quiet` to verify the service is
   actually running before stopping it. Add explicit error message
   if stop fails instead of silently proceeding.

2. Weak systemd unit file parsing (MEDIUM): Handle --port=VALUE
   syntax, quoted ExecStart lines, and ExecStart with spaces.
   Previous parser failed on any non-trivial systemd unit format.

3. PID hint file staleness (MEDIUM): Add creation timestamp (epoch
   seconds) as third line in the hint file format. Reader rejects
   hints older than 24 hours to prevent PID recycling attacks.
   Backwards compatible: old-format files without timestamps are
   still accepted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
